g.onclick: sendPrompt('What IoT sensor data is streamed in for cargo monitoring?')
sendPrompt('What does the ingest and preprocessing agent do in cargo monitoring?')
sendPrompt('How does the anomaly detection agent flag issues in cargo monitoring?')
sendPrompt('How does the risk scoring agent calculate spoilage probability?')
sendPrompt('What decisions does the orchestrator agent make in cargo monitoring?')
sendPrompt('How does the human-in-the-loop approval step work for cargo rerouting?')
sendPrompt('How does the rerouting agent recommend carrier swaps?')
sendPrompt('What does the notification agent alert hospitals and clinics about?')
sendPrompt('What does the compliance agent log for FDA audit readiness?')
sendPrompt('How does the insurance agent generate claim documentation automatically?')
